title: Sk1llful
body:
### Introduction

Sk1llful is a tiny library mod that adds a simple player skill system and allows developers to register new skills.

The mod itself DOESN'T ADD any content for playing.

 

### Commands

/skillful show <player> <skillId> (Show other's skill stat)

/skillful showself <skillId> (Show your skill stat)

/skillful clearinfo (Force clean the cache of skill info)

/skillful changexp <player> <skillId> (Change experience of one's skill)

### Current Available Dependents

[Skills: Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills-vanilla)

### ATTENTION:

You DEFINITELY CAN add the mod to your modpack.
